reviews.comment: In the past 10+ years, my husband and I have been through at least 11 cars, and every time we trade in for a new-to-us vehicle, we call Frederick Window Tinting shortly after signing paperwork. We're always able to get an appointment quickly, and they only have our car for a few hours. Sharyn is so flexible and friendly if you ever need to reschedule. It's nice to know that our business goes to a good, local family and we receive great quality work every single time. 10/10 would recommend. Photo is of my most recent new-to-me vehicle.

reviewReply.comment: Dear Ashley, we are so delighted to read your lovely review! Your loyalty over the years truly warms our hearts. It's fantastic to know that Sharyn's flexibility and our quick service fit so well with your busy schedule. Thanks for choosing us and for recommending our local business to others!

reviews.name: accounts/114723450049664810853/locations/10123051285004451502/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VOQ254dl83Z09mVld3EAE

reviews.comment:
Frederick Window Tinting just tinted my third car, and once again, they absolutely crushed it. From start to finish, the process was smooth, professional, and even kinda fun — which is saying something when you’re dropping off your car and counting down the hours!

These guys go above and beyond every single time. Perfect cuts, clean install, zero bubbles — just flawless results. It’s rare to find a business that’s this consistent, and I genuinely wouldn’t trust anyone else with my ride.

If you’re on the fence, just go for it. Your car (and your eyeballs) will thank you. 😎🚗💨

reviewReply.comment: Mason, your fantastic review just made our day! 😊 We're so glad each tinting experience has been a hit and it's heartening to be a part of your car’s journey. We're all about those smooth, enjoyable visits, and your trust means the world to us. If you ever need anything, you know we're here with open arms!

reviewReply.comment: We're absolutely delighted to learn how happy you are with your Impala's window tinting! Your kind words about our team's effort truly motivate us.
